creator: mwisnicki+freebsd@gmail.com
text:
Here is an improved patch:
http://wisnia21.freeshell.org/f/ports/pl-kadu-0.9.2.diff

Your patch introduced wrong include path and then worked this around
by switching includes to non-conflicting names.
Instead, I have fixed CMakeLists to correctly construct include paths.
Additionally:
- set version to disable git invocation
- depend explicitly on qt-sqlite

P.S. I wasn't very active in maintaining kadu recently. If you want to
take maintainership I will gladly pass it to you.

On Mon, Aug 15, 2011 at 17:20, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
> =C2=A0 =C2=A0http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3Dports/159793
>
